q: How long do the cookies stay fresh?
a: Five days at room temp in the sealed bag they arrive in. Two weeks refrigerated. Three months frozen — just reheat at 160°C for 5 minutes and they're 90% as good as fresh. Reheat instructions come in every box.
Currently we ship within the US and Canada. International shipping is in the works — customs forms for cookies are surprisingly complicated. Join the newsletter for updates.

q: Can I customize a gift box?
a: Absolutely. After you place an order, reply to your confirmation email with any preferences — extra chocolate, no nuts, all one flavor — and we'll make it work. Or use the Build Your Box tool to hand-pick every cookie.

q: What if my cookies arrive damaged?
a: They shouldn't — we pack each cookie in its own sleeve inside a crush-proof box. But if anything goes wrong, email us with a photo and we'll rush a replacement. No questions asked.

q: Do you do corporate orders or events?
a: We do. Orders of 50+ cookies get custom packaging with your logo. Lead time is one week. Email us directly and we'll sort out the details.

q: Are your cookies suitable for gifting?
a: Absolutely — every box is hand-stamped and includes a handwritten note at no extra charge. We've had customers send them for birthdays, anniversaries, holidays, and 'just because' moments. The Celebration box even comes in a wooden gift crate with a candle.

q: What makes your cookies different from store-bought?
a: Three things: ingredients, time, and people. We use 82% butterfat European butter and single-origin chocolate. Our dough cold-ferments for 48 hours. And every cookie is shaped, baked, inspected, and packed by a human who cares — not a machine.

q: Do you offer gluten-free or vegan options?
a: Not yet, but we're working on it. Priya has been testing gluten-free flour blends for six months. We won't launch until it's as good as our classic recipe. Join the newsletter to be first to know when we do.

We don't do formal subscriptions — we prefer you order when you actually want cookies, not because a calendar told you to. But we do drop limited batches every Friday, and newsletter subscribers get early access plus free shipping on their first order.

Yes! We host a Factory Open Day on the third Saturday of every month. Kitchen tours, baking demos, and all-you-can-eat cookies. Free admission, kids welcome. Check the Open Day page for the next date and RSVP.
